# Handoff

Use this template when work may continue in another session, another agent, or a
later review pass.

## Handoff Metadata

- Handoff ID: `HANDOFF-YYYYMMDD-XX`
- Date: `YYYY-MM-DD`
- From: `name or session`
- To: `human reviewer | agent executor | evaluator | mixed`
- Related story or packet:

## Current State

Describe what is true in the repository now.

## Completed Changes

List the concrete changes already made.

- File or artifact:
- Summary:

## Open Risks

List risks that the next reader should not rediscover.

- Risk:
- Why it matters:
- Suggested next action:

## Next Action

State the single best next step.

## Commands Run

```text
command
```

If no commands exist, explain the review method used instead.

## Files Touched

- `path`

## Working Tree State

Describe whether the working tree was clean, dirty, or unknown at handoff time.

- State: `clean | dirty | unknown`
- Notes:

## Read First On Resume

- `AGENTS.md`
- `docs/AGENT_ONBOARDING.md`
- Related story or packet:
- Related test matrix rows:

## Evaluation Notes

- Evaluator outcome: `accepted | accepted_with_gaps | revise | blocked | not_yet_evaluated`
- Evaluator:
- Notes:

## Remaining Gaps

List unresolved proof, traceability, product, architecture, or harness gaps.

## Resume Checklist

- [ ] Read linked story or packet.
- [ ] Check linked test matrix rows.
- [ ] Review commands and evidence freshness.
- [ ] Confirm whether source truth changed since this handoff.
- [ ] Continue from the next action or route back to intake.
